examples: In this instance, the farmers and agronomist are looking to specialized software to give them an accurate plant population count.
A group of corn farmers stands huddled around an agronomist and his computer on the side of an irrigation machine in central South Africa.
The agronomist is sure that he will obtain a near accurate count of plant population with his software.
Rough can be 30% to 60% of a course's total acreage, said Whitlark, the USGA agronomist.
One of the first pieces I was asked to work on was one by a Soviet agronomist.
